notes: Version 4. Panel UX is bundled into the Worker and served from its own domain via the Cloudflare ASSETS binding, so there is no separate GitHub Pages / raw origin to reach, fingerprint, or take down. wrangler adds the assets binding with run_worker_first (keeps auth and the secret-path disguise in front of every request). Same anti-1101 build as before: static cloudflare:sockets import kept external by esbuild, obfuscator reserves the specifier. Fixes GET /admin/warp.json so the panel's WARP status, suggested endpoints, and WireGuard config load correctly. Carries everything from 3.8.3.
